payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: All righty, so to get caught up on what has transpired: the party, after traveling abroad in the distant city of Vasselheim and the surrounding lands, eventually returned to Emon, their central hub city where they had their Greyskull Keep constructed, to relax and take in a brief moment of respite before learning that the Briarwoods, two individuals responsible for much darkness and sadness in the history of Percy, were coming to court in a week to feast and talk with Sovereign Uriel Tal'Dorei. What are you doing?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I've got a Google one.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Google one works fine. But thanks to some of our wondrous, illustrious campmates we were with at Burning Man, they gifted this unto us to gift unto you, as we felt it was fitting and size-appropriate.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, yes! Yes, it makes me look cute! (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You have to measure that out in a regular cup first, and then pour it in.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You could pour two whole drinks in there, and it would be half an inch of liquid.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Wow, this thing's amazing!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: So thanks, post-nuclear family.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well done.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (laughter) That is amazing.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's a hotel ice thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, it's technically an ice bucket.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I want to fill it up right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's hiding your face.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You got to keep pouring. Upon hearing of the Briarwoods' arrival within a week to discuss political matters and enjoy a feast, of course the members of Vox Machina, who are part of the council in Tal'Dorei were invited. Within that week, they made their various preparations, made the various beard checks, made the various beard shavings. It happened! And made their way to the central palace at the Cloudtop District of Emon. The Briarwoods arrived, a feast was put out. However, Percy went in under an illusion to look like Vax over here, while Vax went invisible. Everyone had formal attire on, weapons left at the door, unarmored, dressed for the occasion.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: So thanks, post-nuclear family.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well done.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (laughter) That is amazing.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's a hotel ice thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, it's technically an ice bucket.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I want to fill it up right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's hiding your face.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty, so to get caught up on what has transpired: the party, after traveling abroad in the distant city of Vasselheim and the surrounding lands, eventually returned to Emon, their central hub city where they had their Greyskull Keep constructed, to relax and take in a brief moment of respite before learning that the Briarwoods, two individuals responsible for much darkness and sadness in the history of Percy, were coming to court in a week to feast and talk with Sovereign Uriel Tal'Dorei. What are you doing?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Lock it up! Jeez.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I poured a whole glass in there and it looks like nothing!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, here's the thing you need to know about Uriel. And I take a step back.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Into him?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: No! Away.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He's between you and the door.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, does he hold me if I turn? Well, I just said that, right? Here's the thing about Uriel.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you go to move away, his arms that are on your shoulder, tighten, flex, and hold you in place.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, you don't want to know? Okay, I'll just save that for later.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Roll for coy.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Roll for what, Matt?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Since I don't know what you're going to say, I'm going to say persuasion for this. Because I don't know if it's a deception or not.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Is the power out of the DM's hands for a moment?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, I'm going to use my last Luck of the day!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: The last one?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Last Luck of the day.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay, this is persuasion? That's 17.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That was a big die.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You could give me a-- never mind.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You want an inspiration?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Huh? No.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (laughs) What are you asking for? What are you begging from the DM?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, no, that's why I said never mind.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Is it begging or is it praying, at this point?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, I'll give inspiration when you've goddamn earned it. As you say that looking at them with this coy look of information about Uriel, they both chuckle in unison. (chuckles) "Shall we?" And she gives a nod and goes, "I think we shall."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Can I roll for initiative?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: The door is currently closed, but you're in eagle form, so you're going to be doing like eagles do. I'll say, you're about there because you were a little bit ahead of them. Those are the two guards right there. At this point now, as this is happening, I need you guys to go ahead and roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I guess running towards the Briarwoods' room.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Where you saw them leave? You head up the stairway, following behind where you saw Keyleth and Tiberius rush off to. Are you following the rest of them?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. I put my mug down and I start little leg waddling towards them. As I go, I'm going to send a message. I use Message to-- who's the guy who likes us?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: My name is Vax.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: No, not him. Sylas? No, not Sylas! Seeker Asum?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Seeker Asum, with Message? I believe the person has to be within visual range. Wait, no. You can cast through solid objects if you're familiar with the target and nobody on the barrier. It's 120 foot, though. You don't know how far he is. You could give it a shot.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay, I say, something's gone awry. We may need you right away.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The message is delivered out into the space. Hopefully, it found its recipient.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: As I'm running towards the Briarwoods' room, I start shouting Uriel! and grab a servant and say, go find Uriel. Tell him there's enemies within the gates, in the castle. Now!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Yes, Lady Vex. Right away." Runs off. You guys coast up the stairs. Right as you reach the top of the hallway over here, you can see there are two guards that are currently standing at the door.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I stay at the front door.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Is the door open?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: I'm going to have people who haven't rolled initiative yet, go ahead and roll initiative so I can put you on the timing chart here. Grog?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Well, he's not in the room. He's in the front yard, at this point. So we are heading to the room.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Wait. As that happens, and as my consciousness fades away, I don't say anything, but here's what I think in a split-second. I think of my friends that I have spent so much time with. I think of Keyleth, beautiful, walking under the trees. I think of my twin sister as a young girl, folding up linens with our mother. I think of my sister as an adolescent in lessons, smarter than me. I think of the woman she grew into. Hiking over many, many, many miles together. My best friend. My best friend, Vex'ahlia. And before I can think no more, I say a prayer to Sarenrae to watch over my friends and keep them safe.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go ahead and make a wisdom saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Eight.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: With that thought cast out, the darkness swallows your vision and unconsciousness takes you into the cold, wet grass on the floor of the courtyard surrounding the palace. A small shiver runs down your spine, Vex: a feeling you haven't felt before. A feeling of sudden and immediate sourceless dread, and in that instant you know that there is almost no time.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can I use Hunter's Mark and sense where Lady Briarwood is at that moment?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, she is actually at this point, beyond the palace walls. You can sense and knowing the palace walls. You were expecting a second floor, it's that direction but just outside the walls of the palace. And you guys just got your weapons.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I take off running in that direction.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What do I do, times two?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes, times two.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So it was 32 damage on her, and then everybody within ten feet has to make a dex save.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, he doesn't get one.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Not him. He's not in it. And I Hunter's Marked her.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Right, so it does additional damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Fuck. One.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: One. Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Every little bit counts.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The lightning hits her. It shocks her, and you see the pain come through, but for the sheer force that should have been, it seems almost like it wasn't as impactful as it should have been. However, Lord Briarwood and Seeker Asum both fail, so they both take the additional damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, good. Then 2d8 for them. Nine, and then times two because it was critical? 18.

payload.raw_text: Okay. The first shot. As you (gunshot), the shot echoing out across the night sky of Emon, Lord Briarwood, who is currently staring down at you as you come to consciousness, and you can see under his breath, he says, "Oh, there's no way out tonight, friend." And begins to lean forward before (impact) the back of his shoulder is wracked by a sudden impact. You see dark material just (spray) spatter out with some sort of dark crimson, and he (grunts). Looks over his shoulder with anger, and you can see at that point, glistening across the moonlight, the sharpened fangs visible at the edge of his mouth. As he looks over--

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns_last5.text: These are the worst people we've ever faced.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns_last5.text: I hate them, I hate them so much. Where's my other d12s?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Okay. The first shot. As you (gunshot), the shot echoing out across the night sky of Emon, Lord Briarwood, who is currently staring down at you as you come to consciousness, and you can see under his breath, he says, "Oh, there's no way out tonight, friend." And begins to lean forward before (impact) the back of his shoulder is wracked by a sudden impact. You see dark material just (spray) spatter out with some sort of dark crimson, and he (grunts). Looks over his shoulder with anger, and you can see at that point, glistening across the moonlight, the sharpened fangs visible at the edge of his mouth. As he looks over--

preceding_turns.speaker: KIT
preceding_turns.text: I would have to agree.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Percy. Following suit, you begin to move around the corner to the others. You are now within visual range of both Briarwoods-- at a far distance, though-- too far for the Pepperbox. No, its range is 150, so yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Pepperbox range is 150, but the Bad News range is disgusting.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Nah, they're within range for both.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: So I'll start with Bad News.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Nothing travels faster.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: (sighs) All right. First shot.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Against who?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: (yelling) Sylas!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yes. I got little goosebumps from that.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's a 30 to hit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, that'll hit.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Rock. His. Shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: (sighs) This is about to feel so good.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: De-cleat this motherfucker.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: These are the worst people we've ever faced.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I hate them, I hate them so much. Where's my other d12s?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: d12s? 12, 12 away.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's 17 points of damage.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: At the end of every 30 days.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 18? 18 would unfortunately not succeed. Yeah, you take 21 points of psychic damage--

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: (yelps)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And your intelligence and charisma scores become one.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Suddenly, language leaves you. All the spells, the nature of spellcasting, is robbed, and you know where you are, but everything is instinctual. From this point, you are essentially, from a communication standpoint, a giant lizard.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: (lizard noises) Am I still flying? I'm assuming I fall.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: At this point, actually, yeah, you do, because you can only maintain concentration. And you land on the ground. She then steps--

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Wait! Is it permanent?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You don't know.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I can fix it. It's okay; don't worry about it right now. I can't fix it right now!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Tiberius. It's your turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: What the fuck can I do? Is there a saving throw?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: There is no save.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Then we shall have to have a conversation. For the time being, take care of this one. Tomorrow, when the sun rises, find yourself back to the palace. I would very much like to speak with you. This disturbs me."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: And Tiberius is--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: An idiot.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: He's an idiot. I don't know where he's an idiot right now. Damn it, we lost Tiberius.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: He's even more of an idiot.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: (calling out) Tiberius!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You see now on the front steps sitting there next to Allura, who's cradling him, as he's unsure of what is happening.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, do we see them?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You do, yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Look at his neck.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Uriel looks and says, "I'm certain there is some sort of explanation for this."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You invited vampires into your palace.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You invited them in.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "We will investigate. Look, the Briarwoods are esteemed guests of ours, and friends. So this is going to be taken very seriously."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You can have whatever mages you want cast truth on me. I was bitten. This threat is real.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: The Briarwoods murdered the de Rolos and took Whitestone. I have proof. I was there.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You all manage to make you way up to the temple of Sarenrae. The lantern light of the interior of the temple's main structure is low, as it is late in the evening. Nevertheless, the gates are always open. And as you enter, you are greeted by two clerics that are dressed in long, flowing yellow and gold robes, and there is one elderly cleric that you recall. The one that led the resurrection ritual on Pike. Not but almost a year ago actually.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys gather up--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I turn into a horse and pick up Vax and Vex and take them to Sarenrae's temple.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, you guys leap onto the back of Keyleth as she rides off.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I hold onto your mighty mane, and then him as well.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Allura takes Tiberius, takes you by the elbow, and leads you over the rest of the group as they ride off. "If you are, indeed, going to a cleric, perhaps you should take Tiberius with you. He's not well."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: He seems totally normal to me. Seems like every day. Yep, that's pretty much basic him.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Is Seeker Asum still around?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Seeker Asum currently is nowhere near this situation.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I lick all of Vox Machina.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All that are present, because many are now riding away on a horse. (laughs) But the rest of them get a fine licking.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh jeez, no!

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I lick Grog the most.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Smells like flies.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You all manage to make you way up to the temple of Sarenrae. The lantern light of the interior of the temple's main structure is low, as it is late in the evening. Nevertheless, the gates are always open. And as you enter, you are greeted by two clerics that are dressed in long, flowing yellow and gold robes, and there is one elderly cleric that you recall. The one that led the resurrection ritual on Pike. Not but almost a year ago actually.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys gather up--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I turn into a horse and pick up Vax and Vex and take them to Sarenrae's temple.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, you guys leap onto the back of Keyleth as she rides off.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I hold onto your mighty mane, and then him as well.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Allura takes Tiberius, takes you by the elbow, and leads you over the rest of the group as they ride off. "If you are, indeed, going to a cleric, perhaps you should take Tiberius with you. He's not well."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: He seems totally normal to me. Seems like every day. Yep, that's pretty much basic him.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Is Seeker Asum still around?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Seeker Asum currently is nowhere near this situation.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I lick all of Vox Machina.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All that are present, because many are now riding away on a horse. (laughs) But the rest of them get a fine licking.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh jeez, no!

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I lick Grog the most.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Smells like flies.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: He steps forward, and touches the side of your head on your temple and begins to focus. The symbol of Sarenrae begins to glow on the front of his clavicle. And suddenly, you can see these strange, gray veins that had wrapped around the sides of Tiberius's head retract, dissipate then fade, as intelligence swells back into your brain. And for the first time in at least the past half an hour or so, you are back to being Tiberius Stormwind.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I thought she was disguised.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's right. Never mind, I retract that entire sequence.

preceding_turns.speaker: KIT
preceding_turns.text: He's still looking nervous.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As she comes out of this feverish daydream, none of that happened. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm so glad that didn't happen.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Illusions. All right, so. As you guys enter the center of the chamber. He begins burning various incenses. As you step up, the cleric says, "Understand, these services are intensive in the costs required to present them to you."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We'll pay whatever cost you need.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: No, we should haggle, don't you think?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I lick the cleric.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (chuckles) The cleric  "Oh no, that-- that's, that's very--"

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: How much will it take to save our friends?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Sir, anything.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He says  "For this one, we require a donation to the temple of Sarenrae of a hundred gold pieces."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, done.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "I'm curious to see how this will interact with the enchantment. We'll try. We'll put it at a 25 gold donation for the two days of enchantment."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: To what the water?

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: To bless it. I'm going to hold it up above my head way too dramatically.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "There are rituals, but they take some time. If you'd like to leave it here, we could make use of this and bless the contents of it, yes."

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: No, I thought you could like do a Hosannah and get me out of here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Unfortunately, it doesn't work that way. But should you require such blessing, we would be happy to oblige."

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Wonderful! How many days, give or take, do you think it might take to accomplish?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "For that amount there? Two days."

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Oh wonderful! We'll be here for two days, guys?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Probably will.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I'll leave it with you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "For this volume--" He looks at it for a second and says, "This is an enchanted vial, is it not?"

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Yes! Good eye!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: The tiefling, the male tiefling, steps up forward and says, "I've no quarrel with any of you. We've been scouring this city for a fugitive for a number of weeks. And as luck would have it, you guys happened to smoke her out of her hole."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you guys are having this discussion, a voice rings out behind you and says, "Don't worry. It's not going to help you."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Is that little shitty Mr. Missing One Hand?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No. You turn around and look, and you can see a gentleman standing there about 25 feet away from you. You see dark brown and black studded leather armor with a cloak over one shoulder. Standing straight, with a grin. Deep dark red skin, burning yellow eyes and jet black, slicked hair between two horns that jut back. A tiefling stands there, looking forward, with two individuals flanking from side to side that are slowly stepping--

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I don't know what they do, but I'm raising my arm up. Who goes there? Who are you? I've had a really bad day.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You are, yes. And we're going to go ahead and have you guys roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You're guarded against scrying in your room?

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Guards against scrying? Yes, of course!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Is that true?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Against scrying.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm pretty sure we would have to have an enchantment on our keep that would guard against scrying.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you guys are having this discussion, a voice rings out behind you and says, "Don't worry. It's not going to help you."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Is that little shitty Mr. Missing One Hand?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No. You turn around and look, and you can see a gentleman standing there about 25 feet away from you. You see dark brown and black studded leather armor with a cloak over one shoulder. Standing straight, with a grin. Deep dark red skin, burning yellow eyes and jet black, slicked hair between two horns that jut back. A tiefling stands there, looking forward, with two individuals flanking from side to side that are slowly stepping--

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I don't know what they do, but I'm raising my arm up. Who goes there? Who are you? I've had a really bad day.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The tiefling, the male tiefling, steps up forward and says, "I've no quarrel with any of you. We've been scouring this city for a fugitive for a number of weeks. And as luck would have it, you guys happened to smoke her out of her hole."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I go ahead and crack my staff on the ground and cast Anti-life Shell.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: And are they at the door?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys are walking from the outside of the wall to your keep.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Where are they?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Right now? They are coming from Emon. You guys are in this in-between section between your keep--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We're outdoors? We've left the temple?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Well, that's his attack. It's been a while since you attacked with Trinket.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, Trinket (galloping sounds) rolls forward and (bear rolling sounds). Both of them try to move out of the way, they both get their dex save. All right, so Broker manages to pull out of the way just in time. However, the other, the big, thicker character doesn't quite have the dexterity to shift out of the way and takes the full impact. Okay. He suffers 14 points of bludgeoning damage as Trinket tears through.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Eat it! Go, Trinket!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He is knocked prone.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Good job, buddy! Little buddy!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's Trinket's attack.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Then I get a move, still. I mean, I get an action. I'm going attack him! I'm going to attack the Broker!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: For how that works for you and your bear, because that's his attack this turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I mean, yes. I'm assuming that's his attack, or was that his move?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You would be able to, because it has been your turn, you would have your reaction back. So yes, you could. So go ahead and roll a d20.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The masked individual, from what you can tell behind the eyes of the mask, does not seem emotionally affected by this.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Also, just checking, does my glove still have a charge, by the way?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It may.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Okay. I mean, is there any indication, like it would have a slight glow to it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There is a slight vibration. That ends your turn?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That is the end of my turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. The old woman gets up and is like, (panicked gasps).

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: (old lady voice) I feel happy. I feel alive.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You're in Atlantic City. Everything's okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As a bonus action, casts Misty Step and appearing 30 feet over here.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Do I get to swing?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No. Because Misty Step happens.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Damn Misty and her steps.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She stands up and vanishes in a swirl of vapor. She appears a little ways away in the field and immediately, (mumbles a spell).

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Counterspell! 5th-level. Fuck it.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: We're hoping to do stuff like that every now and then in the future to bring in some Critters to throw their creative mind in here and incorporate a character into our world. My heart's been going a mile a minute that entire game, because no DM wants to have to kill a player.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: But we got to go.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go. Travel safe. Bye, guys.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I love you guys.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Can I hold your mug? I want to see what it feels like. Wow! Look at the size of that.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's still got some booze in there, if you want to take a slurp.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. As a note, just so you guys are aware, we had a contest yesterday about 5:30 in the afternoon during one of the streams. We had everyone who was currently present in the chat room be part of this random drawing, and the winner was a David Kingsbury, who won the opportunity to provide the name and essence of an NPC in our campaign. The Broker is actually their construction.

preceding_turns.speaker: KIT
preceding_turns.text: That's amazing!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The Broker was designed by one of our viewers, one of our Critters.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Thank you for the target practice.

preceding_turns.speaker: KIT
preceding_turns.text: Thank you so much!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That is so cool.

preceding_turns.speaker: KIT
preceding_turns.text: That's amazing.
